Game: The Mask 1995-10-01T00:00:00-07:00 Somebody Stop Me! With this Mask, you can do anything! Zip around at the speed of sound! Pull guns and mallets out of thin air! Spin like a tornado! And it's a good thing, cubby, because crime boss Dorian Tyrel is going to blow the CoCo Bongo club into next week unless you can get past all of Edge City's toughest thugs!
